title: Alcinous (philosopher)
body: Alcinous (Greek: Ἀλκίνοος Alkinoos) was a Middle Platonist philosopher.  He probably lived in the 2nd century AD, although nothing is known about his life. He is the author of The Handbook of Platonism, an epitome of Middle Platonism intended as a manual for teachers. He has, at times, been identified by some scholars with the 2nd century Middle Platonist Albinus.
